name: QQ Agent Mail
author: Finch Team
description: Connect QQ Agent Mail through the official CLI and MCP tools.

name: Browser Tools
author: JoeHe
description: Browser automation tools for Finch — navigate, click, fill forms, take screenshots, debug, and more. Powered by Chrome DevTools MCP (Google).

name: Frontend Design
author: Finch Team
description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with a bundled design skill.

name: Git Branch
author: Finch Team
description: A handy Git branch widget inside your chat dialog.

name: MCP Client
author: Finch Team
description: Connect Model Context Protocol servers and expose their tools to the Finch agent.

name: Finch Mini Tool Demo
author: Finch Team
description: A comprehensive demo extension showcasing all Finch mini tool capabilities: forms, toasts, custom icons, composer actions, and i18n.

name: Office Tools
author: JoeHe
description: Office tools for Finch — read, create, edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files using OfficeCLI.

name: Plan Mode
author: Finch Team
description: Planning mode for Finch conversations. Break down tasks before execution.

name: PP-OCRv6
author: JoeHe
description: OCR extension powered by PP-OCRv6 — extract Chinese and English text from images using Python PaddleOCR.

name: Tavily Search
author: Finch Team
description: Connect Tavily Search through MCP and make web search, extract, crawl, and map tools available to Finch.
